subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of the Kingdom and Sovereign of Might! I beseech Thee by Thy Name which, were it to be cast upon the mountain, would cause it to soar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الملکوت و سلطان الجبروت اسئلک باسمک الذی لو یلقی علی الجبل لیطیر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @education of children; moral education, @rejection, opposition and persecution
